Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LogDispatch/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LogDispatch/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LogDispatch/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:49 2014	(r352328)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LogDispatch/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:53 2014	(r352329)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Plugin that adds Log::Dispatch support to CGI::Application
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-Log-Dispatch>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Log-Dispatch \
 		p5-UNIVERSAL-require>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-UNIVERSAL-require
